meaning: n.洗,洗涤,冲洗,洗涤剂,洼地,洗的衣服,冲积物vt.洗,洗涤,洗清,粉刷,冲出,弄湿,流过,镀金于vi.洗涤,洗澡,被冲蚀,漂浮adj.耐洗的,(证券交易)虚假的
examples: I must wash the car tomorrow.
These ink stains won't wash out.
I wash my hair every night.
They are all controlled by a venture capital firm called Intellectual Ventures, based in Bellevue, Wash.
The idea is to sweat, loosening dirt and toxins in preparation for your wash.
